_comment: ACT Phase 2 connector registry. Declarative map of channel -> outward capability. The conductor reads this, then discovers a matching MCP tool via ToolSearch at runtime (mcp_hint). NO vendor code lives here. Default posture: draft/reversible first. 'mode' = auto (may execute after per-action approval) | draft (only stage/draft, human does the final send) | manual (no connector path; fall back to the Phase-1 artifact).

connectors.mcp_hint: netlify deploy OR vercel deploy OR github pages publish
connectors.notes: Deploy stage D1 (static only). Default GitHub Pages (existing git auth); auto-use Netlify/Vercel CLI/MCP if present; degrade to act/deploy/*.deploy.md if none. Server apps → D2 (not built). Per-action approval + verify-200.

connectors.mcp_hint: linear create issue OR jira create issue OR github create issue
connectors.notes: Turn gtm-tasks into tracker issues. Reversible (close/delete).

connectors.mcp_hint: buffer schedule OR typefully draft OR x create post
connectors.notes: Default DRAFT/SCHEDULE only — never auto-publish. Human approves the queue.
Create a Gmail DRAFT — never send. Human reviews + sends.

connectors.mcp_hint: wordpress create draft OR ghost create draft OR notion create page
connectors.notes: Create an unpublished CMS draft. Human publishes.

connectors.mcp_hint: google sheets append OR drive create file
connectors.notes: Push the gtm.csv task list into a sheet. Reversible.
